_publications._publicationTitle: C-Fiber Loss as a Possible Cause of Neuropathic Pain in Schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: 13 of 14 patients who underwent skin biopsy exhibited a significant reduction of intraepidermal nerve fiber density (1.85 ± 0.92/mm) in comparison to age-adjusted reference-values (1.7–5.7/mm) with a mean deviation from the age-dependent reference value of 1.84 ± 1.24/mm
details: Used for skin biopsy analysis to determine intraepidermal nerve fiber density. 13 of 14 patients showed significant reduction in IENFD (1.85 ± 0.92/mm) compared to age-adjusted reference values (1.7–5.7/mm) with mean deviation of 1.84 ± 1.24/mm.
